name: Oliver Jones
abstract: Oliver Theophilus Jones,  (born September 11, 1934) is a Canadian jazz pianist, organist, composer and arranger. In 2023, he was inducted into the Canadian Music Hall of Fame.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Oliver Jones, Piano, and Jimmy Owens, Trumpet

about_quotes.speaker: Albert Jiles
about_quotes.evidence: INTERVIEWER: Who did Oliver Jones or Olivier, I want to know about that? [INTERVIEWEE] Who did he play with? Well he played with different bands in the city...
